tasks.label: Verify live endpoints
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/api/news).Content; Write-Host '---'; $body = @{source='This is a test article about climate migration'; transcript='this is a test article about climate migration'} | ConvertTo-Json; (Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body http://localhost:3000/api/score).Content"

tasks.label: Verify homepage branding
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/).Content | Select-String -Pattern '多闻 Renews|Lingua Studio' -AllMatches"

tasks.label: Rewrite news API route

Kill stale Node servers on port 3000

tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetIPAddress | Where-Object { $_.AddressFamily -eq 'IPv4' -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress"

tasks.label: Get local IPv4 address via ipconfig
Restart dev server after UI rewrite
Find process on port 3000 after restart attempt
Start dev server with latest UI
Start Renews dev server via node
Inspect local IP and port 3000
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_.InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*'} | Select-Object -First 5 InterfaceAlias,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize); Write-Host '---'; (Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:3000/).StatusCode"

tasks.label: Get local IP and test access
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ip = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*' } | Select-Object -First 1).IPAddress; Write-Host "IP=$ip"; if ($ip) { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://$ip:3000/" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode }"

tasks.label: Get local IP and test access 2
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ip = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*' } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress); Write-Host "IP=$ip"; if ($ip) { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://$ip:3000/" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode }"

tasks.label: Get local IP simple
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*' } | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.IPAddress }"

tasks.label: Verify news API metadata
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$body = (Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://192.168.0.103:3000/api/news).Content; $obj = $body | ConvertFrom-Json; $first = $obj.articles[0]; Write-Host ($first.author); Write-Host ($first.location); Write-Host ($first.title)"

tasks.label: Kill dev server and restart
tasks.command:
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($p) { taskkill /F /PID $p }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next; node .
ode_modules
ext\dist in
ext dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000"

tasks.label: Stop dev server for build
tasks.command: cmd /c netstat -ano | findstr :3000 | findstr LISTENING | for /f "tokens=5" %a in ('more') do @taskkill /F /PID %a

tasks.label: Fetch RSS sample
tasks.command: cmd /c node -e "fetch('https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/world/rss.xml').then(r=>r.text()).then(t=>{const m=t.match(/<title>([\s\S]*?)<\/title>/g); console.log(m.slice(0,5).join('\n')); console.log('---'); const d=t.match(/<description>([\s\S]*?)<\/description>/g); console.log(d.slice(0,5).join('\n'));}).catch(err=>{console.error(err); process.exit(1);})"

tasks.label: Inspect API media metadata
tasks.command: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/news | node -e "const fs=require('fs');const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const sample=data.articles.slice(0,3).map(a=>({title:a.title, mediaUrl:a.mediaUrl, mediaCaption:a.mediaCaption, source:a.source})); console.log(JSON.stringify(sample,null,2));"

tasks.label: Validate certificate and key files in Node
tasks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const crypto=require('crypto'); const cert=fs.readFileSync('.\\certs\\local.crt','utf8'); const key=fs.readFileSync('.\\certs\\local.key','utf8'); try { crypto.createPrivateKey(key); const x509=new crypto.X509Certificate(cert); console.log('cert-ok', x509.subjectAltName); } catch (e) { console.error('error', e.message); process.exitCode=1; }"
